mapper.select: SELECT TM_ID, PATIENCE, AMBITION, FINANCIAL_STRICTNESS, INVESTMENT_WILLINGNESS, YOUTH_PREFERENCE, STAR_PREFERENCE, LOYALTY_TO_GM, REBUILD_TOLERANCE, WIN_NOW_PREFERENCE, ANALYTICS_PREFERENCE, SCOUTING_PREFERENCE, FAN_PRESSURE_SENSITIVITY, MEDIA_SENSITIVITY, LOCAL_IDENTITY_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_INVESTMENT, PERFORMANCE_OVER_POPULARITY, RISK_TOLERANCE, FACILITY_PREFERENCE, STAFF_INVESTMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_SATISFACTION, FIRING_RISK, BUDGET_FLEXIBILITY, PITCHER_PREFERENCE, BATTER_PREFERENCE FROM TM_OWN_PRPNST WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId}

SELECT TM_ID, PATIENCE, AMBITION, FINANCIAL_STRICTNESS, INVESTMENT_WILLINGNESS, YOUTH_PREFERENCE, STAR_PREFERENCE, LOYALTY_TO_GM, REBUILD_TOLERANCE, WIN_NOW_PREFERENCE, ANALYTICS_PREFERENCE, SCOUTING_PREFERENCE, FAN_PRESSURE_SENSITIVITY, MEDIA_SENSITIVITY, LOCAL_IDENTITY_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_INVESTMENT, PERFORMANCE_OVER_POPULARITY, RISK_TOLERANCE, FACILITY_PREFERENCE, STAFF_INVESTMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_SATISFACTION, FIRING_RISK, BUDGET_FLEXIBILITY, PITCHER_PREFERENCE, BATTER_PREFERENCE FROM TM_OWN_PRPNST ORDER BY TM_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_OWN_PRPNST ( TM_ID, PATIENCE, AMBITION, FINANCIAL_STRICTNESS, INVESTMENT_WILLINGNESS, YOUTH_PREFERENCE, STAR_PREFERENCE, LOYALTY_TO_GM, REBUILD_TOLERANCE, WIN_NOW_PREFERENCE, ANALYTICS_PREFERENCE, SCOUTING_PREFERENCE, FAN_PRESSURE_SENSITIVITY, MEDIA_SENSITIVITY, LOCAL_IDENTITY_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_INVESTMENT, PERFORMANCE_OVER_POPULARITY, RISK_TOLERANCE, FACILITY_PREFERENCE, STAFF_INVESTMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_SATISFACTION, FIRING_RISK, BUDGET_FLEXIBILITY, PITCHER_PREFERENCE, BATTER_PREFERENCE ) VALUES ( #{tmId}, #{req.patience}, #{req.ambition}, #{req.financialStrictness}, #{req.investmentWillingness}, #{req.youthPreference}, #{req.starPreference}, #{req.loyaltyToGm}, #{req.rebuildTolerance}, #{req.winNowPreference}, #{req.analyticsPreference}, #{req.scoutingPreference}, #{req.fanPressureSensitivity}, #{req.mediaSensitivity}, #{req.localIdentityPreference}, #{req.veteranPreference}, #{req.foreignPlayerInvestment}, #{req.performanceOverPopularity}, #{req.riskTolerance}, #{req.facilityPreference}, #{req.staffInvestmentPreference}, #{req.currentSatisfaction}, #{req.firingRisk}, #{req.budgetFlexibility}, #{req.pitcherPreference}, #{req.batterPreference} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PATIENCE = #{req.patience}, AMBITION = #{req.ambition}, FINANCIAL_STRICTNESS = #{req.financialStrictness}, INVESTMENT_WILLINGNESS = #{req.investmentWillingness}, YOUTH_PREFERENCE = #{req.youthPreference}, STAR_PREFERENCE = #{req.starPreference}, LOYALTY_TO_GM = #{req.loyaltyToGm}, REBUILD_TOLERANCE = #{req.rebuildTolerance}, WIN_NOW_PREFERENCE = #{req.winNowPreference}, ANALYTICS_PREFERENCE = #{req.analyticsPreference}, SCOUTING_PREFERENCE = #{req.scoutingPreference}, FAN_PRESSURE_SENSITIVITY = #{req.fanPressureSensitivity}, MEDIA_SENSITIVITY = #{req.mediaSensitivity}, LOCAL_IDENTITY_PREFERENCE = #{req.localIdentityPreference}, VETERAN_PREFERENCE = #{req.veteranPreference}, FOREIGN_PLAYER_INVESTMENT = #{req.foreignPlayerInvestment}, PERFORMANCE_OVER_POPULARITY = #{req.performanceOverPopularity}, RISK_TOLERANCE = #{req.riskTolerance}, FACILITY_PREFERENCE = #{req.facilityPreference}, STAFF_INVESTMENT_PREFERENCE = #{req.staffInvestmentPreference}, CURRENT_SATISFACTION = #{req.currentSatisfaction}, FIRING_RISK = #{req.firingRisk}, BUDGET_FLEXIBILITY = #{req.budgetFlexibility}, PITCHER_PREFERENCE = #{req.pitcherPreference}, BATTER_PREFERENCE = #{req.batterPreference}
